briefdescription.para: Portable Cortex-A53/ARMv8 execution capability snapshot.
A53 VM initialization summary.
A53 process address-space root and owned physical pages.
Minimal AArch64 lower-EL trap frame used for syscall/fork handoff.
Record normalized boot state discovered by A53 assembly entry.
Initialize portable A53 execution capabilities and emit smoke markers.
Initialize A53 translation tables and physical page accounting.
Allocate one managed physical page.
Retain one managed physical page.
Release one managed physical page.
Create a per-process A53 address space.
Destroy a per-process A53 address space.
Activate a process address space for user memory access.
Return to the kernel translation root.

memberdef.argsstring: (rad_a53_address_space_t *space, uintptr_t virtual_address, uintptr_t physical_address, int writable)
memberdef.name: rad_a53_map_user_page

briefdescription.para: Map a user page into an A53 address space.
Clone a parent address space into a child using copy-on-write.
Handle an AArch64 data abort as a possible COW fault.
Validate a user virtual range against the active A53 address space.
Copy bytes from active user memory.
Copy bytes to active user memory.
Copy a NUL-terminated string from active user memory.
Dispatch a syscall captured in an AArch64 trap frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (uintptr_t number, uintptr_t arg0, uintptr_t arg1, uintptr_t arg2, uintptr_t arg3, uintptr_t arg4, uintptr_t arg5)
memberdef.name: rad_a53_syscall_dispatch

briefdescription.para: Dispatch a syscall using the AArch64 x8/x0-x5 ABI contract.
Spawn a user process through the A53 process layer.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *path, int32_t parent_pid, const char *stdio_path, int32_t *pid_out, rad_task_t *task_out)
memberdef.name: rad_a53_user_spawn_process_with_stdio

briefdescription.para: Spawn a user process and bind stdin/stdout/stderr to a device or PTY path.
Run a user init process through the A53 process layer.
Dispatch an AArch64 exception frame saved by the platform vector stubs.
Enter or resume an AArch64 EL0 context.
Register the A53 process architecture operations with the kernel core.
Copy the current A53 capability snapshot to the caller.
Run the A53 process fork/exec-mark/wait smoke path.
Run the A53 copy-on-write page isolation model self-test.
